signals.headline: A **fragile ceasefire agreement** in the U
signals.raw: A **fragile ceasefire agreement** in the U.S./Israel-Iran war was announced earlier this week (pre-April 9), triggering profitable bets on Polymarket for an April 7 halt, though its status remains uncertain with no new confirmations.[2]

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote securing 98.27% in favor, positioning Solana as a top high-speed execution layer amid strong network activity like $117B DEX volume overtaking Ethereum.[2][3]

signals.raw: Prediction markets are surging in activity over Iran war outcomes, but no fresh events today; White House issued prior warnings (March 24) against staff betting with insider info.[3]
